title: understand-link manifest
description: Hand-maintained service inventory for cross-service graph linking (DESIGN.md §13 decision ①). The single entry point: lists every service, where its subgraphs live, and the HTTP normalization context the extractor cannot infer.

backend.description: Registry backend. v0.1 implements json only; sqlite is reserved for v0.3.

serviceId.description: Stable unique id for the service (used as the node id in the system graph).

repo.description: Repository name / label. Defaults to serviceId.

root.description: Path to the service source root to scan for .java files. Relative paths resolve against the manifest's directory. Defaults to repo or '.'.

graphRef.description: Path to the service's knowledge-graph.json (hard prerequisite — run /understand). Relative to the manifest's directory.

domainRef.description: Path to the service's domain-graph.json (hard prerequisite — run /understand-domain). Relative to the manifest's directory.

http.description: HTTP route normalization context the static scan cannot infer (DESIGN.md §6 / §13 decision ①).

basePath.description: Service base path prepended to controller routes, e.g. "/aurora".

gatewayPrefix.description: Gateway prefix prepended ahead of basePath, e.g. a sisyphus gateway route prefix.

mq.description: MQ extractor config for self-wrapped RocketMQ (DESIGN.md §6.1). Override only when a service names its base/send classes differently.

consumerBaseClass.description: Simple name of the MQ consumer base class. Default "AbstractRocketMqHandler".

producerClass.description: Simple name of the MQ send service whose .send(topic, …) marks a producer. Default "MqSendService".

protocols.description: Per-protocol extraction switches. Omitted protocols default to enabled. v0.2 supports dubbo + http (Java providers + fe consumers) + mq.
